name: Paz Oil Company Ltd.
summary: Paz Oil Company Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, refines, produces, stores, imports, sells, and markets fuel products in Israel and internationally. The company markets oil and fuel products at its 268 fueling stations, and food and convenience products at the 241 Yellow market stores; leases its filling station spaces to various lessees, including businesses, restaurants, coffee shops, stores, etc.; and provides engineering, maintenance, and logistic services for the retail infrastructure customers. It is also involved in the direct marketing of fuels and oil products to industries, companies, enterprises, and aviation companies, as well as to car fleets and the Palestinian Authority. In addition, it is involved in the marketing, distribution, and sale of LPG for cooking, heating, and fueling LPG-operated cars to institutional, business, and private customers; marketing, distribution, and sale of devices that consume LPG; production, recycling, import, marketing, and export of lubricants, chemicals, and solvents; production, marketing, and export of sealing and insulation solutions, bitumen, coatings, and adhesives for the transportation, infrastructure, and construction industry; and marketing, supply, and storage of jet fuel and aviation gasoline, as well as provides refueling services to aviation companies. Further, Paz Oil Company Ltd. manufactures petroleum products and electricity. The company was formerly known as The Shell Company of Palestine and changed its name to Paz Oil Company Ltd. in 1960. Paz Oil Company Ltd. was founded in 1922 and is based in Yakum, Israel.
